name: Contract-shift incentive
what: "12 months for the price of 11" offer moving month-to-month customers to annual contracts
key_risk: Discounts some customers who would have stayed anyway (50% haircut applied)

name: Model-targeted saves
what: Score the book monthly; retention offers to the riskiest 20% by model score
key_risk: Offer fatigue; model precision decays without quarterly retraining

name: Premium onboarding bundle
what: Bundle tech support + online security free for 6 months for new fiber customers
key_risk: Add-on effect may be self-selection - pilot as a 500-customer A/B test
